name: Regulatory Compliance Assessment
description: Comprehensive, all-tier assessment of how an activity, product, or transaction must comply with the regulatory frameworks that govern it in a specified jurisdiction. Identifies engaged regimes, assesses compliance, and recommends remediation. Works for any sector and any legal system.
taskDescriptionTemplate:
Assess the regulatory compliance position for the following matter.

Matter: {{description}}

Documents provided: {{document}}

The assessment should:
1. Establish the jurisdiction(s) where obligations attach; if unstated, infer and flag the assumption.
2. Identify every regulatory framework engaged by the facts (e.g. data protection, competition, financial,
   employment, consumer, environmental/ESG, trade controls) — selecting only those actually triggered.
3. For each engaged framework, extract the specific obligations and assess compliance: met / partial / breach / unclear.
4. Identify licensing, registration, notification, and reporting triggers.
5. Flag cross-border and extraterritorial exposure.
6. Recommend remediation per gap, prioritised by severity and enforcement risk.
